---
feature: bulk-actions
title: Bulk Actions
date: "2026-04-01"
status: draft
goals: [reduce-support-load]
metrics:
  - metric: weekly-active-users
related_features: []
depends_on: [task-assignment]
---

## Why

Support tickets keep coming in from users who need to reassign or close
dozens of tasks at once and currently have to do it one at a time. This
depends on task assignment already existing.

## Scope

- Multi-select in the task list
- Bulk reassign and bulk close only, for this version
